produce the integral of $ P(x) $ from 0 to 10 is $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) dx = \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} = 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.
